channel.title: Settlement Watch
channel.description: Legal settlements from courts and regulators

item.title: [$556M] Kaiser Permanente Medicare Fraud Settlement
item.description: Kaiser Permanente pays $556 million in record Medicare Advantage fraud settlement. Largest Medicare Advantage recovery.

item.title: [$9.5M] Stericycle Hazardous Waste Settlement
item.description: DOJ and EPA settle with Stericycle over hazardous waste violations.

item.title: [$40M] Cencora/Lash Group Data Breach Settlement
item.description: Cencora and Lash Group data breach class action settlement. Up to $5,000 per claimant.

item.title: [$1.5B] Anthropic AI Copyright Settlement
item.description: Anthropic agrees to pay authors at least $1.5 billion to settle copyright lawsuit over AI training data.

item.title: [$100M] Verizon Administrative Charges Settlement
item.description: Verizon class action over administrative charges. Check eligibility.

item.title: [$150M] Atlantic Richfield EPA Superfund Settlement
item.description: EPA and Montana settle with Atlantic Richfield for Superfund site cleanup. Environmental remediation required.

item.title: [$12.5M] Cash App Text Message Settlement
item.description: Cash App $12.5M text message class action settlement. TCPA violations. Payments of $394 per claimant.

item.title: [$80M] Kia Vehicle Theft Settlement
item.description: Kia $80 million settlement for vehicle theft claims. TikTok challenge-related thefts.

item.title: [$425M] Teva Pharmaceuticals DOJ Settlement
item.description: Teva Pharmaceuticals agrees to pay $425 million to resolve DOJ investigation. False Claims Act enforcement.

item.title: [$23M] TransUnion Credit Report Settlement
item.description: TransUnion settles credit report dispute claims.

item.title: [$4.9B] Attorney General Bonta Opposes Trump Administration’s Proposed Slashing of Healthcare AI Transparency and Bias Protections

item.title: Advice and Guidance
item.description: Advice and Guidance Learn more about your rights as a consumer and how to spot and avoid scams. Find the resources you need to understand how consumer protection law impacts your business. Take action Report fraud Report identity theft Register for Do Not Call Sign up for consumer alerts Get Busines

item.title: Policy
item.description: Policy We work to advance government policies that protect consumers and promote competition. View Policy

item.title: How Loyalty Discounts Between Firms Harm Competition When There Are Network Effects: FTC v. Surescripts
item.description: Competition Matters How Loyalty Discounts Between Firms Harm Competition When There Are Network Effects: FTC v. Surescripts Matthew Chesnes (DAD, BE Antitrust I) and Ted Rosenbaum (Acting BE Director) February 13, 2026

item.title: Search or browsethe Legal Library
item.description: Search or browse the Legal Library Find legal resources and guidance to understand your business responsibilities and comply with the law. Browse legal resources Search small Search

item.title: Enforcement
item.description: Enforcement We enforce federal competition and consumer protection laws that prevent anticompetitive, deceptive, and unfair business practices. View Enforcement

item.title: [$5,000] Nissan - CVT Transmissions Class Action Settlement
item.description: Nissan - CVT Transmissions Class Action Settlement Settlement Payout Up to $5,000 Deadline Varies Proof Required? Yes You may be included in this settlement if you owned or leased a 2014-2018 Rogue, 2015-2018 Pathfinder or a 2015-2018 Infiniti QX60. Visit Official Settlement Website Share

item.title: [$30] Michael Kors Outlet Stores - Sale Discounts Class Action Settlement
item.description: Michael Kors Outlet Stores - Sale Discounts Class Action Settlement 20 Days Left • Featured Settlement Payout $30 Merchandise Card Deadline 3/20/26 Proof Required? No You may be included in this settlement if you made a purchase at a Michael Kors outlet store between May 10, 2019 and November 14, 20

item.title: [$10] Boohoo - Advertised Sales Class Action Settlement
item.description: Boohoo - Advertised Sales Class Action Settlement Settlement Payout $10 Gift Card Deadline Varies Proof Required? N/A You may be included in this settlement if you bought products from Boohoo, BoohooMAN, PrettyLittleThing or Nasty Gal outside of California between April 1, 2016 and June 17, 2022. Vi

item.title: [$10] Theranos Blood Testing Services Class Action Settlement
item.description: Theranos Blood Testing Services Class Action Settlement Settlement Payout $10+ Deadline Varies Proof Required? N/A If you paid for Theranos blood testing services out-of-pocket, through health insurance, or through any other source between November 2013 and June 2016, you may be included in this set

item.title: [$7] Bayer - Antifungal Spray Class Action Settlement
item.description: Bayer - Antifungal Spray Class Action Settlement 11 Days Left • Featured Settlement Payout $7+ Deadline 3/11/26 Proof Required? No You may be included in this settlement if you purchased a Lotrimin or Tinactin product covered by Bayer’s October 2021 recall, which includes products purchased between

item.title: My Little Steamer Class Action Settlement
item.description: My Little Steamer Class Action Settlement Settlement Payout Varies Deadline Varies Proof Required? Yes This settlement aims to cover anyone who purchased a Joy/JM-branded My Little Steamer between January 1, 2002 and December 31, 2020. Visit Official Settlement Website Share

item.title: Ford - PowerShift Transmissions Class Action Settlement
item.description: Ford - PowerShift Transmissions Class Action Settlement Settlement Payout Varies Deadline Varies Proof Required? Yes This settlement covers current and former 2011-2016 Fiesta and 2012-2016 Focus owners and lessees who had issues with their PowerShift transmissions. Visit Official Settlement Website
